name: Chocolate Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the flour, cocoa, and sugar.
2. Add the egg yolks to the dry ingredients.
3. Gradually add milk until the mixture is well combined with the eggs.
4. Stir in vanilla and butter.
5. Cook over medium heat, stirring constantly until thickened.
6. Pour into a baked pie shell.
7. Top with meringue and brown.
8. Makes 2 - 8 inch pies from filling.
